message:
🌱 flux: Reduce the mean time to recovery (MTTR) in case of failed deployments (#1832)

* 🌱 Add flux: Reduce the mean time to recovery (MTTR) in case of failed mission

* 🌱 Add flux: Reduce the mean time to recovery (MTTR) in case of failed mission

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

@@ -0,0 +1,76 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "flux-5584-reduce-the-mean-time-to-recovery-mttr-in-case-of-failed-deployments",
+  "missionClass": "fixer",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "flux: Reduce the mean time to recovery (MTTR) in case of failed deployments",
+    "description": "Reduce the mean time to recovery (MTTR) in case of failed deployments. Requested by 16+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current flux deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your flux version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n flux -l app.kubernetes.io/name=flux\nhelm list -n flux 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working flux installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review flux configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant flux configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n flux -l app.kubernetes.io/name=flux\nkubectl get configmap -n flux -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=flux\n```\nIn Flux 2.7 we've added a new feature to kustomize-controller to speed up the cluster reconciliation by canceling ongoing health checks when a new source revision is detected."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Reduce the mean time to recovery (MTTR) in case of failed…",
+        "description": "Helm support is now implemented [here](https://github.com/helm/helm/pull/31435). It will land in Helm 4 in December, so we can target support for both kustomize and helm in Flux 2.8.\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n flux -l app.kubernetes.io/name=flux\nkubectl get events -n flux --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Reduce the mean time to recovery (MTTR) in case of failed…\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Helm support is now implemented [here](https://github.com/helm/helm/pull/31435). It will land in Helm 4 in December, so we can target support for both kustomize and helm in Flux 2.8.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "flux",
+      "graduated",
+      "app-definition",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "flux"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [
+      "Deployment",
+      "Configmap",
+      "Secret"
+    ],
+    "difficulty": "beginner",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "graduated",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/fluxcd/flux2/issues/5584",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/fluxcd/flux2"
+    },
+    "reactions": 16,
+    "comments": 1,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with flux installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-04-01T06:36:10.547Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
